.pokh-modal-content { height: calc(100vh - 200px); overflow-y: auto; } .pokh-tabset { height: 100%; } .pokh-tab-content { height: calc(100vh - 300px); overflow-y: auto; } /* Ensure these styles only apply to the POKH modal */ ::ng-deep .pokh-modal .ant-modal { width: 90% !important; max-width: 1400px; } ::ng-deep .pokh-modal .ant-modal-body { height: calc(100vh - 200px); overflow: hidden; } ::ng-deep .pokh-modal .ant-tabs-content { height: 100%; } ::ng-deep .pokh-modal .ant-tabs-tabpane { height: 100%; }
